description: Lexer tokenizes all arithmetic, comparison, logical operators and parens
steps: Disambiguate = vs ==, ! vs !=, * vs **, |> vs ||, < vs <=, > vs >=
Tokenize str(x) as IDENT LPAREN IDENT RPAREN

description: Parser produces correct AST with operator precedence via recursive descent
steps: Parse all comparison ops into BinaryExpr

description: Runtime implements all arithmetic, comparison, logical operations and Str
steps: Add, Sub, Mul, Div, Mod, Pow element-wise same-length
Negate unary on all numeric types
Eq, Neq, Lt, Gt, Lte, Gte single-element only
And, Or, Not operate on truthiness
Str returns FormatValue wrapped as string SlopValue

description: Codegen lowers BinaryExpr, UnaryExpr, CallExpr to sloprt calls
steps: Lower all 14 binary ops to sloprt.X(left, right)

description: 58 e2e tests covering arithmetic, unary, comparisons, logic, precedence, str, chained
steps: 12 arithmetic tests pass (add, sub, mul, div, mod, pow, single, zero, long, float, uint)
6 unary tests pass (negate, zero, negative, double, float, not-falsy)
4 not tests pass (truthy, zero-truthy, double-not-truthy, double-not-falsy)
14 comparison tests pass (eq, neq, lt, gt, lte, gte true/false, string eq/neq)
6 logical tests pass (and both, and-right-falsy, and-left-falsy, or-left-falsy, or-left-truthy, or-both-falsy)
8 precedence tests pass (mul-before-add, parens, left-assoc, power, arith-before-cmp, cmp-before-logic, and-before-or)
4 str tests pass (array, single, empty, expr-result)
4 chained tests pass (add, mul-div, logical, unary-then-binary)
